# Retail Dive-Cyberthreats: How to Prep for the Upswing This Holiday Season

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Watch the webinar to hear from Rebecca Alter, Trust and Safety Architect at Sift, John Lunn, CEO at Gr4vy, and Scott E. Adams, CEO/Co-Founder at FraudDeflect discuss how retail fraud is evolving what retailers must do to ensure their fraud prevention strategies scale to meet the holiday demand.

*   Holiday shopping trends: Why holidays are especially vulnerable to fraud, and the ramifications of this vulnerability
*   Fraud insights: How account takeover (ATO) and AI/automation fraud is evolving
*   Strategic fraud defense: What businesses can do to protect their operations and customers from increasing fraud threats

### Watch the On-Demand Webinar
